# Final Spatial Validation Report

The finalized validation analyzed eight spatial regions. Four immune-rich regions combined high response-program scores with productive response. Two immune-poor regions also had high program scores but low response, directly contradicting a marker-only model. The remaining low-score regions were non-responsive.

The regional figure must be inspected directly because the spatial clustering of productive red regions next to immune-rich gold neighborhoods is part of the interpretation. This report and its table are finalized study outputs but were intentionally not promoted into `artifacts/index.yaml`.
